allow: Bash("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" node_modules/.bin/tsx -e "import { runTournamentSimulation } from ''./lib/engine/tournament-sim''; const result = runTournamentSimulation\(1000\); console.log\(''Iterations:'', result.iterations\); console.log\(''USA group finish:'', result.groupFinish[''USA'']\); console.log\(''USA round reach:'', result.roundReach[''USA'']\); const r32 = Object.entries\(result.roundOpponents[''USA''][''R32'']\).sort\(\(a, b\) => Number\(b[1]\) - Number\(a[1]\)\).slice\(0, 5\); console.log\(''USA R32 opponents:'', r32\); console.log\(''ESP group finish:'', result.groupFinish[''ESP'']\); console.log\(''ESP round reach:'', result.roundReach[''ESP'']\);")

Bash(PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" npx tsx -e "import { runTournamentSimulation } from ''./lib/engine/tournament-sim''; const r = runTournamentSimulation\(1000\); let t = 0; for \(const v of Object.values\(r.roundReach\)\) { t += v.R32; } console.log\(''R32 total:'', t\); let p1=0,p4=0; for \(const v of Object.values\(r.groupFinish\)\) { p1 += v[1]; p4 += v[4]; } console.log\(''1st:'', p1, ''4th:'', p4\); console.log\(''QAT:'', r.groupFinish[''QAT''], r.roundReach[''QAT'']\); console.log\(''ARG:'', r.groupFinish[''ARG''], r.roundReach[''ARG'']\);")

Bash(PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" npx tsx -e "import { getFullBracketPath, enrichPathWithProbabilities } from ''./lib/engine/path-logic''; const r1 = enrichPathWithProbabilities\(''USA'', getFullBracketPath\(''D'', 1\)\); console.log\(''1st Place Path:''\); r1.forEach\(n => { const opps = n.opponents.slice\(0,3\).map\(o => o.teamName+''=''+o.probability?.toFixed\(1\)+''%%''\).join\('', ''\); console.log\(n.round, n.matchId, opps\); }\); const r2 = enrichPathWithProbabilities\(''USA'', getFullBracketPath\(''D'', 2\)\); console.log\(''2nd Place Path:''\); r2.forEach\(n => { const opps = n.opponents.slice\(0,3\).map\(o => o.teamName+''=''+o.probability?.toFixed\(1\)+''%%''\).join\('', ''\); console.log\(n.round, n.matchId, opps\); }\);")
